text:
1. Proficiency in Python programming for backend development and automation tasks
2. Experience building REST APIs using FastAPI or Flask frameworks
3. Ability to work with SQL databases for data storage and retrieval operations
4. Familiarity with machine learning concepts such as preprocessing and model evaluation
5. Experience processing CSV and JSON datasets using Pandas and NumPy
6. Understanding of object-oriented programming and clean code practices
7. Ability to use Git for version control and collaborative development workflows
8. Familiarity with Linux environments and command-line tools for development tasks
9. Experience developing automation scripts to improve workflow efficiency
10. Ability to debug backend applications and resolve performance-related issues
11. Understanding of API testing, request validation, and error handling techniques
12. Familiarity with logging systems and basic monitoring for backend services
13. Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams during software development projects
14. Experience integrating third-party APIs into backend applications
15. Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn new technologies and frameworks
